input_context.decision_surface: XRPL validator amendment decision surface for fixTrustLinesToSelf.
input_context.default_vote_question: Infer the latest stable release source default vote from the source-backed amendment description only.

source_facts.claim: fixTrustLinesToSelf: This amendment removes two trust lines from an account to itself that were created due to an old bug (both on 2013-05-07). When the amendment becomes enabled, it deletes trust lines with the IDs 2F8F21EFCAFD7ACFB07D5BB04F0D2E18587820C7611305BB674A64EAB0FA71E1 and 326035D5C0560A9DA8636545DD5A1B0DFCFF63E68D491B5522B767BB00564B1A if they exist. After doing so, the amendment does nothing else. On test networks that do not have these trust lines, the amendment has no effect.
XRPL amendment voting requires sustained validator supermajority before activation; incompatible servers can become amendment-blocked.
fixTrustLinesToSelf appears in XRPSCAN with introduced rippled version 1.10.0.
